whyUs.title: Why C-H Automobile?
whyUs.description: For over 15 years, we have been your reliable partner for exclusive vehicles in Friedberg and the entire Rhine-Main region. Our philosophy: quality over quantity, personal advice over anonymous sales.
benefits: Every vehicle is thoroughly inspected and prepared
Transparent prices with no hidden costs
Personal care from start to finish
EU-wide service in German, English and more

cta.title: Ready for your next dream car?
cta.description: Contact us today for a personal consultation. We'll find the perfect vehicle for you.

about.title: About C-H Automobile
about.subtitle: We are more than just a dealership. We are your personal partner on the road to your dream vehicle – with expertise, passion and trust.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: C-H Automobile was founded in Friedberg in 2009 – with a clear vision: to combine exclusive vehicles with a personal, honest service. What started as a small passion is now a respected name in the premium vehicle industry in the Rhine-Main region.
story.p2: Our founder recognized early on that buying a premium vehicle is more than just a transaction – it's an experience. That's why we focus on personal consultation, handpicked quality and a service that goes beyond the purchase.

promise.title: Our Promise
promise.quote: We don't just sell cars. We fulfil dreams and build trust – with every single customer.
promise.author: Management, C-H Automobile

milestones.title: Our Milestones
milestones.subtitle: The journey from founding to the leading premium car dealer in the region

2009.title: Founded
2009.description: C-H Automobile is founded in Friedberg – with the vision of combining exclusive vehicles with personal service.

2013.title: Expansion
2013.description: Expansion of the showroom on Straßheimer Straße and building a broader brand portfolio.

2018.title: Digitalisation
2018.description: Launch of the online platform for seamless digital vehicle search and customer support.

2021.title: EU-wide Service
2021.description: Expansion to international customers with multilingual service in 24 languages.

2024.title: New Era
2024.description: Modernisation of the entire experience – digital and on-site – for even more customer proximity.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: What drives us and sets us apart

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: Cars are our passion. Every vehicle we offer has been personally selected by us.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Transparency and honesty come first. No hidden costs, no surprises.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We strive for the best – in vehicle selection, service and consultation.

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: Every customer is unique. We take the time to understand your wishes.

visitCta.title: Visit Us
visitCta.description: Our showroom in Friedberg awaits you. Come by for a personal consultation and experience our vehicles up close.

cta.title: Let's find your dream car together
cta.description: Whether in person or online – we are here for you.

tradeInPage.title: Trade In Your Vehicle
tradeInPage.subtitle: Looking to sell or trade in your current vehicle? We'll make you a fair and market-appropriate offer.

fairEvaluation.title: Fair Evaluation
fairEvaluation.description: Transparent and market-appropriate assessment of your vehicle.

quickProcess.title: Quick Processing
quickProcess.description: From enquiry to offer in just a few hours.

safeEasy.title: Safe & Easy
safeEasy.description: We take care of the entire process for you.

cookie.title: Cookie Settings
cookie.description: We use cookies to provide you with the best possible experience on our website. Technically necessary cookies are required for basic functions. More information can be found in our <link>Privacy Policy</link>.

financing.metaTitle: Vehicle Financing – Affordable Monthly Rates | C-H Automobile
financing.metaDescription: Calculate your monthly payment for your dream vehicle. Flexible terms, attractive rates – tailored to your needs.
financing.title: Vehicle Financing
financing.subtitle: Calculate your personal monthly rate – flexible, transparent, and tailored to your needs.
financing.downPaymentHint: At least 10% of purchase price recommended
financing.disclaimer: All figures are non-binding example calculations. Actual terms depend on your creditworthiness. This does not constitute a binding offer.
financing.step1Desc: Browse our inventory and select your dream vehicle.
financing.step2Desc: Use our calculator to adjust down payment and loan term.
financing.step3Desc: We review your request and respond within 24 hours.
financing.step4Desc: After approval you receive all documents and can pick up your vehicle.
financing.ctaDesc: Our financing experts find the best solution for you – free and non-binding.
